title: How to get a police certificate - Bhutan - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Bhutan
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Security Clearance Certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you have a Citizenship Identity card
Apply online via the Royal Bhutan Police’s e-services .

### If you do not have a Citizenship Identity card
Contact the Royal Bhutan Police Headquarters by telephone (View Contact information).
Security Clearance Service
Tel: 00975-02-322347 (Ext: 2125/2212)
Email : dcopcrime@rbp.gov.bt
